implementation_roadmap_taken: Confirm Render backend and frontend service IDs, URLs, and deploy branch.
Commit generated CAPS topic maps, diagnostic item bank, lesson bank, blueprints, study-plan templates, seeders, and validation tooling.
Push the same deploy SHA to both origin/master and origin/main because Render deploys main while the local checkout tracks master.
Redeploy backend and frontend from explicit commit SHAs.
Attempt direct Render one-off seed jobs and record that the current Render plan blocks one-off jobs and non-interactive SSH.
Harden seeders so diagnostic items load the new topic-map path and lesson rows can use a disabled system seed owner and learner.
Add an idempotent production startup seeder that checks live coverage, upserts missing approved diagnostic items and lessons, and skips once coverage is complete.
Fix live seed blockers by ignoring generated artifact metadata fields not present in diagnostic_items and making SQLAlchemy asyncpg PgBouncer-safe for Supabase transaction pooling.
Verify live health, deep health, diagnostic item coverage, lesson coverage, and frontend HTTP 200.

outstanding_tasks.title: Replace startup seeding with an operational seed command
outstanding_tasks.detail: Render one-off jobs were blocked on the current plan, so production startup seeding is the working implementation. Long term, enable Render jobs or add an admin-only seed runner and then disable automatic startup seeding.

outstanding_tasks.title: Add a canonical lesson-bank model
outstanding_tasks.detail: Approved launch lessons are currently stored in learner-scoped lessons rows attached to a disabled system seed learner. Add a dedicated lesson_bank or approved_lessons table for canonical reusable content.

outstanding_tasks.title: Seed assessment blueprints into runtime storage
outstanding_tasks.detail: Blueprint artifacts exist in the repository, but runtime assessment blueprint persistence and serving still need a canonical repository or table path.

outstanding_tasks.title: Expand beyond the Grade 4 Mathematics launch slice
outstanding_tasks.detail: The green slice is limited to 4.M.1.1, 4.M.1.2, and 4.M.1.3. Next phases are full Grade 4 Mathematics and then Grades R-7.

outstanding_tasks.title: Add an admin coverage dashboard
outstanding_tasks.detail: Backend coverage APIs exist. The admin frontend still needs a clear coverage panel for diagnostic items, lessons, and blueprints.

outstanding_tasks.title: Audit frontend subject and content flows end to end
outstanding_tasks.detail: Backend content is seeded and verified. Still perform browser and user-flow verification for subjects, diagnostics, lesson generation, study plans, assessment attempts, and parent dashboard using real learner sessions.

outstanding_tasks.title: Add CI guardrails for launch content
outstanding_tasks.detail: Add tests that reject ORM-incompatible generated artifacts, keep PgBouncer-safe DB config from regressing, and verify seeded launch refs remain green.
